name: Whale Source Taxonomy
purpose: Define source classes without external calls.

name: Known Exchange / CEX Cluster Boundary
purpose: Prevent exchange omnibus wallets from being treated as individual whales.

name: Smart Money / Insider / Deployer Separation
purpose: Separate true whale, deployer, insider, sniper, and coordinated wallets.

name: Fake Whale / Real Whale Separation
purpose: Block wash wallets, sybil clusters, and liquidity mirage signals.

name: Whale Flow Direction Contract
purpose: Classify accumulation, distribution, exit, rotation, and trap behavior.

name: Whale Evidence Contract
purpose: Attach evidence level and confidence to every whale assertion.

name: Whale Risk Interaction Boundary
purpose: Whale signal may inform risk, but cannot authorize trade.

name: Whale Shadow Dryrun Route
purpose: Prepare V2_45 shadow dryrun with fixtures only.

boundary: Whale engine cannot call API/RPC in V2_44.
Whale engine cannot track live wallets in V2_44.
Whale engine cannot write DB in V2_44.
Whale engine cannot bind runtime in V2_44.
Whale engine cannot touch wallet/private-key material.
Whale engine cannot send outbound packet.
Whale signal is evidence and classification only.
